meta.title: Are we spilling secrets by talking about classified programs?
meta.description:
Alex Hollings spends a lot of time and effort analyzing new developments in US defense programs, particularly aviation efforts like the Air Force’s Next Generation Air Dominance and B-21 Raider stealth bomber. 

But throughout our coverage of these and similar program, one question appears in the comments on social media and YouTube more than any other: Why are we revealing details from these secretive programs to America’s enemies?

Here's the scoop... The Pentagon wants us talking about this stuff. Let's discuss why.

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
